title: rosa × yesoensis
intro: Rosa × yesoensis, also known as the Korean rose or Yeso rose, is a hybrid tea rose species that is native to the Korean Peninsula. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The medicinal properties of Rosa × yesoensis have been found to have various health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Rosa × yesoensis is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
